config.label: Header Title
config.placeholder: Gift Certificates

config.label: Header Subtitle
config.placeholder: Send personalised gift certificates to your loved ones.

config.label: Main Text
config.placeholder:
Buy a gift certificate to redeem for

  • tickets to performances
  • tickets for tours
  • Royal Opera House Stream subscription
  • membership
  • programme vouchers
  • a donation to the Royal Opera House

You can personalise the gift certificate with a message and an image and send it at a time of your choice.

config.label: About Title
config.placeholder: About Gift Certificates

config.label: About Text
config.placeholder:
Standard gift certificates can be used to purchase tickets, buy programme vouchers or to donate to the Royal Opera House. Membership gift certificates allow someone to enjoy a Royal Opera House membership.

You can redeem a gift certificate online when you check out, by telephone and via the Box Office.

Gift certificates are valid for 36 months from the date of purchase, or from the date of being gifted if specified. Membership gift certificates are valid for one year.

config.label: How To Redeem Section Title
config.placeholder: How to redeem gift certificates

config.label: How To Redeem Section Text
config.placeholder: Certificates can be redeemed online when you check out, by telephone and via the Box Office. They can be used to purchase tickets, buy programme vouchers, make a donation and purchase a Royal Opera House membership.

config.label: Terms and Conditions Title
config.placeholder: Terms and conditions

config.label: Terms and Conditions Text
config.placeholder:
• Gift certificates cannot be used at the Royal Opera House cafés, bars and restaurants, or in the shop.
  • Gift certificates cannot be redeemed for cash in part or whole. Gift certificates cannot be refunded.
  • Gift certificates cannot be replaced if lost or stolen.
  • The Royal Opera House cannot be responsible for delayed or lost post.
  • Membership prices rise annually. If a Gift Membership is purchased and there is a rise between purchase and activation of over one month, the recipient will be liable for additional costs.

config.label: Standard Certificate Description
config.placeholder: You can redeem a gift certificate for tickets, programme vouchers, membership and donations to the Royal Opera House. Gift certificates are valid for 36 months. Gift certificates are delivered via email only.

config.label: Stream Certificate Description
config.placeholder: A one year subscription to Royal Opera House Stream.

config.label: Membership Certificate Description
config.placeholder: You can redeem a gift membership for one year of membership.
